items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Gomorrah?
items.explanation: Ciro Di Marzio is one of the defining characters in Gomorrah.

items.q: The character Laure Berthaud appears in Spiral.
items.explanation: Laure Berthaud is a key character in Spiral.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Paatal Lok?
items.explanation: Hathi Ram Chaudhary is one of the defining characters in Paatal Lok.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Andrea Martel.
items.explanation: Andrea Martel is strongly linked to Call My Agent!.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Deutschland 83?
items.explanation: Martin Rauch is one of the defining characters in Deutschland 83.

items.q: Which character is strongly associated with the tv show Twin Peaks?
items.explanation: Dale Cooper is one of the defining characters in Twin Peaks.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character John Sheridan.
items.explanation: John Sheridan is strongly linked to Babylon 5.

items.q: The character Doron Kavillio appears in The Fall.
items.explanation: Doron Kavillio appears in Fauda, not The Fall.

items.q: Which tv show features the character Benjamin Sisko?
items.explanation: Benjamin Sisko is associated with Star Trek: Deep Space Nine.

items.q: Name the tv show that features the character Stella Gibson.
items.explanation: Stella Gibson is strongly linked to The Fall.
